logo: { margin: 0, color: "#111827" }, navLinks: { display: "flex", gap: "14px" }, loginBtn: { padding: "11px 24px", borderRadius: "10px", border: "1px solid #d1d5db", background: "white", cursor: "space-between", alignItems: "center", padding: "90px 70px" }, left: { width: "55%" }, badge: { background: "#dbeafe", color: "#2563eb", display: "inline-block", padding: "10px 18px", borderRadius: cursor: "pointer", fontWeight: "bold" }, right: { width: "35%", display: "grid", gap: "18px" }, workerCard: { background: "white", padding: "20px", borderRadius: "16px", boxShadow: "0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)", fontSize: "18px", fontWeight: "500" } };
